docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NEWTON, WAYNE ROXANNE AS TO DEFENDANT R J REYNOLDS TOBACCO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-03-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-04-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-05-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-02-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-02-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-17-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-03-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-17-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
